_source_text:
BROOKLYN COMMUNITY BOARD 6
Joint Landmarks and Zoning & Building Committee
Wednesday, May 1, 2024, 7:00 PM
141 Fifth Avenue (Fifth Avenue Presbyterian Church), Brooklyn, NY 11217

AGENDA

Item 5. Public Hearing — Proposed Individual Landmark Designation, 427 Sterling Place

Community Board 6 will hold a public hearing on the proposed individual landmark designation of 427 Sterling Place, Brooklyn, NY 11217, a late-19th century rowhouse in the Crown Heights neighborhood. The application was submitted to the Landmarks Preservation Commission on March 8, 2024.

Residents and interested parties are invited to testify. No specific comment deadline has been established; the Board will forward its recommendation to LPC following this hearing.
